title: Bridge Essay: Resolving the Delusion Paradox.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** (Phase 6) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Dependent-arising to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Resolving the Delusion Paradox.** — Schizophr Bull. PMID: 37478890. DOI: 10.1093/schbul/sbad084. The neurocomputational framework of predictive processing (PP) provides apromising approach to explaining delusions, akey symptom of psychotic disorders. According to PP, the brain makes inferences about the world by weighing prior beliefs against the available sensory data. Mismatches between prior beliefs and sensory data result in prediction errors that may update the brain'smodel of the world. Psychosis has been associated with reduced weighting of priors relative to the sensory data. How
